sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: The board transformed again! New layout with many green blocks. Let me find all green blocks and clear them systematically.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check remaining green blocks
seg = current_frame.segmentation
greens = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N' and n['pixels'] > 5]
print(f"Green blocks: {len(greens)}")
for g in greens:
    b = g['boundary']
    center = (sum(r[0] for r in b)//len(b), sum(r[1] for r in b)//len(b))
    print(f"  center={center}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.content: 12 green blocks remain. Let me move RIGHT to activate the full purple region, then click them all.

</parameter>

</tool_call>
